query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotations` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `documentType` enum('quotation','invoice','payment_receipt') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quotation', `quotationNo` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `clientName` varchar(256) NOT NULL, `clientAddress` text, `clientCountry` varchar(128), `clientTrn` varchar(128), `projectName` varchar(256), `quotationDate` varchar(32), `validUntil` varchar(32), `incoterms` varchar(32), `paymentTerms` varchar(256), `currency` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', `notes` text, `paymentSchedule` text, `bankDetails` text, `products` text, `subtotal` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `vatTotal` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `userId` int, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `quotations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user WXqa14W8mSgTfpb.99f8bb228633 --database X5tJK2uaPFqt5EwqucHsfz --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotations` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `documentType` enum('quotation','invoice','payment_receipt') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quotation', `quotationNo` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `clientName` varchar(256) NOT NULL, `clientAddress` text, `clientCountry` varchar(128), `clientTrn` varchar(128), `projectName` varchar(256), `quotationDate` varchar(32), `validUntil` varchar(32), `incoterms` varchar(32), `paymentTerms` varchar(256), `currency` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', `notes` text, `paymentSchedule` text, `bankDetails` text, `products` text, `subtotal` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `vatTotal` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `userId` int, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `quotations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
